title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 374.182 - Organization plan to be submitted — contents
text:
374.182.  Organization plan to be submitted — contents. — The department shall submit an organizational plan in the same manner as is required of departments under subsection (2) of section 1 of the Reorganization Act of 1974; provided, however, that the compensation levels to be reported shall include those of the director, the deputy director, the assistant director for policies and licenses, the assistant director for consumer services and the general counsel.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1739 § 4)
